tools.description: Replace code patterns using AST matching. Use meta-variables in both pattern and replacement. IMPORTANT: dryRun=true (default) only previews changes. Set dryRun=false to apply.
tools.name: ast_grep_replace

tools.description: Search for code patterns using AST matching. Uses meta-variables: $NAME (single node), $$$ARGS (multiple nodes). Example: "function $NAME($$$ARGS)" finds all function declarations.

path.description: Directory or file to search in

tools.name: ast_grep_search

tools.description: Get diagnostics (errors, warnings) for a file. Uses tsc --noEmit for TypeScript projects.
tools.name: lsp_diagnostics

tools.description: Run project-level diagnostics on a directory using tsc --noEmit. Returns all errors across the project.
tools.name: lsp_diagnostics_directory

tools.description: Get a hierarchical outline of all symbols in a file (functions, classes, variables, etc.).
tools.name: lsp_document_symbols

tools.description: Find all references to a symbol across the codebase using grep-based search.
tools.name: lsp_find_references

tools.description: Get type information and documentation at a specific position in a file (regex-based approximation).
tools.name: lsp_hover

tools.description: List available diagnostic backends and their installation status.
tools.name: lsp_servers

tools.description: Search for symbols (functions, classes, etc.) across the workspace by name.

file.description: Any file in the workspace (used to determine project root)

query.description: Symbol name or pattern to search

tools.name: lsp_workspace_symbols

tools.description: List known safe result artifact files under .omx plans/specs/goals/context/reports.
tools.name: hermes_list_artifacts

tools.description: Read structured question lifecycle events for coordinator bridge correlation.
tools.name: hermes_list_question_events

tools.description: List bounded structured question records without reading terminal UI.
tools.name: hermes_list_questions

tools.description: List known OMX session state for a bounded worktree without reading terminal UI.
tools.name: hermes_list_sessions

tools.description: Read one safe .omx result artifact by relative path with byte truncation.
tools.name: hermes_read_artifact

tools.description: Read selected session/mode status JSON from OMX state files.
tools.name: hermes_read_status

tools.description: Read the bounded OMX session history log tail, not tmux scrollback.
tools.name: hermes_read_tail

tools.description: Write a small final/blocker status report for Hermes without owning merge policy.

allow_mutation.description: Must be true for mutating operations; read tools ignore it.

tools.name: hermes_report_status

tools.description: Queue one explicit prompt for a selected OMX exec session via the audited follow-up queue.

allow_mutation.description: Must be true for mutating operations; read tools ignore it.

tools.name: hermes_send_prompt

tools.description: Start a new isolated OMX tmux session in disposable worktree mode for one bounded prompt.

allow_mutation.description: Must be true for mutating operations; read tools ignore it.

tools.name: hermes_start_session

tools.description: Submit a bounded structured answer by question id; never proxies arbitrary terminal input.

allow_mutation.description: Must be true for mutating operations; read tools ignore it.

tools.name: hermes_submit_question_answer

tools.description: Prune Working Memory entries older than N days (default: 7).

daysOld.description: Prune entries older than this many days (default: 7)

tools.name: notepad_prune

tools.description: Read notepad content. Can read full or a specific section (priority, working, manual).
tools.name: notepad_read

tools.description: Get statistics about the notepad (size, entry count, oldest entry).
tools.name: notepad_stats

tools.description: Add entry to Manual section. Never auto-pruned.
tools.name: notepad_write_manual

tools.description: Write to Priority Context section. Replaces existing. Keep under 500 chars.
tools.name: notepad_write_priority

tools.description: Add timestamped entry to Working Memory section.
tools.name: notepad_write_working

tools.description: Add a persistent directive to project memory.
tools.name: project_memory_add_directive

tools.description: Add a categorized note to project memory.

category.description: Note category (build, test, deploy, env, architecture)

tools.name: project_memory_add_note

tools.description: Read project memory. Can read full memory or a specific section.
tools.name: project_memory_read

tools.description: Write/update project memory. Can replace entirely or merge.
tools.name: project_memory_write

tools.description: Clear/delete state for a specific mode.

all_sessions.description: Clear matching mode in global and all session scopes

tools.name: state_clear

tools.description: Get detailed status for a specific mode or all modes.
tools.name: state_get_status

tools.description: List all currently active modes.
tools.name: state_list_active

tools.description: Read state for a specific mode. Returns JSON state data or indicates no state exists.

mode.description: The mode to read state for

tools.name: state_read

tools.description: Write/update state for a specific mode. Creates directories if needed.

terminal_outcome.description: Legacy alias for lifecycle_outcome; canonical writes should prefer lifecycle_outcome.

tools.name: state_write

tools.description: Show aggregate statistics for agent flow trace. Includes turn counts, mode usage, token consumption, and timing.
tools.name: trace_summary

tools.description: Show chronological agent flow trace timeline. Displays turns, mode transitions, and agent activity in time order.

filter.description: Filter: all (default), turns (agent turns only), modes (mode transitions only)

last.description: Show only the last N entries

tools.name: trace_timeline

tools.description: Quick-add a single wiki page. Rejects overwrites; use wiki_ingest to merge.
tools.name: wiki_add

tools.description: Delete a wiki page and update the index.
tools.name: wiki_delete

tools.description: Process knowledge into wiki pages. Creates new pages or merges into existing ones.
tools.name: wiki_ingest

tools.description: Run health checks on the wiki.
tools.name: wiki_lint

tools.description: List wiki pages and return the index when present.
tools.name: wiki_list

tools.description: Search wiki pages by keywords and tags. Returns raw matches for synthesis.
tools.name: wiki_query

tools.description: Read a specific wiki page.
tools.name: wiki_read

tools.description: Rebuild the wiki index and refresh derived metadata surfaces.
tools.name: wiki_refresh
